_instructions: These selectors were mapped from the live Higgsfield AI interface on April 12, 2026. Update if the UI changes.

_notes.promptInputs: Image page uses contenteditable div (#hf:tour-image-prompt), video page uses div[role='textbox']. Both need click→selectAll→delete→type workflow, NOT innerText assignment.
_notes.fileUploads: File inputs are hidden 1x1 pixel elements. Use Playwright setInputFiles() directly on them.
_notes.modelSelection: Image: model is baked into the URL path (/image/nano_banana_2). Video: Veo 3.1 Lite may already be selected — check before clicking through model picker.
_notes.audioToggle: Veo 3.1 Lite: audio is a checkbox input that defaults to ON. Verify checked === true before proceeding.
_notes.imageDownload: Click history card to open lightbox → Download button in right panel. Images from images.higgs.ai CDN.
_notes.videoDownload: Videos play inline (no lightbox). Extract <video src> from d8j0ntlcm91z4.cloudfront.net or use hover overlay download button.
_notes.referenceUpload: Up to 14 dynamic slots (56x56 each) with hidden file inputs. New slots appear as existing ones are filled. Filled slots show img thumbnail + close button (24x24, top-right).
_notes.startFrameUpload: Single file input in label (259x119) on video page. setInputFiles() directly.

timing.creditCost: Video: 12 credits per clip (8s, 720p, 16:9, audio). Image: free with Unlimited mode.

imageGeneration._modelNote: Model is pre-selected via query param. Old path-based URLs (/image/nano-banana-pro) now redirect to /ai-image landing page (no gen UI). Always use /ai/image?model=nano-banana-pro.
imageGeneration._aspectRatioNote: Nano Banana Pro supports: auto, 1:1, 3:4, 4:3, 2:3, 3:2, 9:16, 16:9, 5:4, 4:5, 21:9. Native <select> is hidden behind a custom dark popup but selectOption() works end-to-end (confirmed Session 8 DevTools test). Caller passes aspectRatio as a parameter to generateImage(). Select index [0] is aspect, [1] is resolution.
imageGeneration._referenceNote: Nano Banana supports up to 14 reference image slots. Slots may load dynamically — new empty slots appear as existing ones are filled. Use setInputFiles() on each. They accept: image/jpeg, image/jpg, image/png, image/webp

_referenceSlotStructure.containerClass: relative rounded-xl bg-neutral-surface-subtle transition group shrink-0 size-14
_referenceSlotStructure.emptyState: SVG upload icon inside label > button.size-full
_referenceSlotStructure.filledState: img thumbnail in div.absolute.inset-0 + close button (24x24) at top-right
_referenceSlotStructure.thumbnailConfirmation: Wait for img element to appear inside slot container after upload
_referenceSlotStructure.dynamicSlots: New empty slots appear after filling existing ones — may need to re-query input[type='file'] after each upload

_lightboxStructure.rightPanel: Details tab with PROMPT, INFORMATION sections
_lightboxStructure._promptTextNote: div.attribute-text-value.w-full.text-wrap.break-words — contains the generation prompt. May be truncated; click 'See all' button to expand.
_lightboxStructure._seeAllNote: Appears below prompt when text is long. Parent is a <button> with cursor-pointer. Click to expand full prompt text.

_historyCardStructure.clickTarget: aside > button (first button, full card size e.g. 376x501)
_historyCardStructure._clickNote: The full-size invisible button inside aside is the click target to open the lightbox. Single click opens it.
_historyCardStructure.authorLink: a tag with user profile link

_hoverOverlayButtons.containerClass: absolute top-2.5 right-2.5 z-10 pointer-events-auto flex flex-col

videoGeneration._modelNote: Default model may vary. Check current selection and switch to Veo 3.1 Lite if needed via Model button > Google Veo > Google Veo 3.1 Lite.
videoGeneration._modelAlreadySelected: If page shows 'Veo 3.1 Lite' in the model area, skip model selection entirely.
videoGeneration.modelArea: div containing 'Google Veo 3.1 Lite' text in left panel
videoGeneration._startFrameNote: Single file input accepts: image/jpeg, image/jpg, image/png, image/webp. MUST use filechooser interception (click label → filechooser.setFiles). setInputFiles() bypasses React state.

_startFrameUploadArea.subtext: PNG, JPG or Paste from clipboard
_startFrameUploadArea.confirmationNote: After upload, image preview appears in the upload area replacing the icon

videoGeneration._audioNote: Audio defaults to ON when Veo 3.1 Lite is selected. The checkbox near 'On' text. Verify checked=true.
videoGeneration._settingsNote: Video settings (duration, ratio, resolution) use BUTTONS with dropdown menus, NOT native <select> elements. Click the button to open dropdown, then click the option.
videoGeneration._aspectRatioNote: Veo 3.1 Lite page also has a real native <select> underneath the chip-style popup (confirmed Session 8). generateVideo() uses page.$$('select')[0].selectOption(aspect) as the primary path; the button-based setVideoDropdownOption('Ratio') remains only as a fallback. Veo native select accepts: auto, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, 3:4, 1:1, 21:9 — but the visible popup only exposes auto/16:9/9:16. Pipeline ships with 16:9 and 9:16 only.
videoGeneration._videoDownloadNote: Videos play inline in History tab (no lightbox). Can extract src from <video> element or use hover download button.

_notes.purpose: Selectors for Higgsfield's Assets/All page used by inline auto-recovery and the CLI recover-from-history.js script. When local generation fails before we capture the CDN URL, the scraper opens this page, finds today's videos, matches them to our pending DB clips by prompt + timestamp, and downloads the orphans — saving credits.
_notes.discovery: Initial selectors based on screenshots from April 2026. Refine after first live test session in DevTools.
_notes.urlPattern: Each asset has a stable UUID: /asset/all/<uuid>. Use this as the cross-run dedup key (stored in project_assets.higgsfield_asset_id).
_notes.detailPanel: Clicking a thumbnail opens a right-side panel with PROMPT, INFORMATION (Model, Quality, Size, Created), and action buttons (Recreate, Publish, Video edit, Download, Heart, Share, more). Likely also fires GET /api/asset/<uuid> with full metadata — check Network tab and prefer JSON over DOM scraping.
_notes.datePartitioning: Page auto-groups by date with 'Today' / 'Yesterday' / 'X days ago' headers. Use this to scope scraping to a recent window without filtering client-side.
_notes.leftSidebar: Filters: All Assets / Favorites / Tools (Image, Video, Audio counts shown in badges). Click 'Video' to scope to videos only.

assetHistory._todayItemSelector_PHASE1: PLACEHOLDER — discover the per-thumbnail container selector during Phase 1 DevTools session. Likely something like '.asset-grid > div' or a data-attribute like '[data-asset-id]'.
assetHistory._apiEndpoint_PHASE1: PLACEHOLDER — check Network tab during Phase 1 for an XHR/fetch like GET /api/asset/<uuid> that returns JSON with cdn_url, prompt, created_at. If found, use this instead of DOM scraping (faster, more reliable).
